name: sipi-bot-spend-firewall
description: Spend firewall for autonomous AI agents: evaluate a transaction against your rules and get approve, block, or flag before any money moves.

tools.name: evaluate_transaction
tools.description: Given amount, merchant, and category, returns APPROVED, BLOCKED, or FLAGGED against the configured spend rules.

category.description: Spend category, e.g. compute, saas, api
